title: Powder Coating System for Manual Coating Equipment
content:
Powder Coating System for Manual Coating Equipment

 The powder coating system for manual coating equipment is a flexible electrostatic powder coating solution designed for manual coating applications. Operators use a handheld spray gun to apply powder to the workpiece surface. A typical system includes a trolley, control unit, powder hopper or box feeder, and electrostatic spray gun. By using high-voltage electrostatic charging, the powder is attracted evenly to the workpiece surface, making this system suitable for small-batch production, complex workpieces, and fast color change operations.

Features

 Flexible Operation and Easy Mobility

Equipped with casters, the powder coating system can be moved easily between different coating stations and is suitable for on-site coating of various workpieces.

 Fast Color Change and Easy Cleaning

With its compact structure and direct powder feeding design, the system simplifies color changes and supports production environments that require frequent powder color switching.

 High Transfer Efficiency and Coating Quality

Advanced manual electrostatic spray gun technology helps achieve even coating thickness and strong powder adhesion, especially on workpieces with complex geometries.

Options Available

 ![Powder Coating System for Manual Coating Kits, GC20F with Hopper](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/pros_img01_m.webp)

[Powder Coating System for Manual Coating Kits, GC20F with Hopper](https://powdercoating-en.com/manual-coating-kits-gc20f-1-1.html)
Equipped with a 50L powder hopper, this model offers strong flexibility and adaptability for manual coating of large workpieces. It is easy to operate and convenient for daily production use.

 ![Powder Coating System for Manual Coating Equipment, GC20FZ with Vibratory Box Feeder](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/pros_img02_m.webp)

[Powder Coating System for Manual Coating Equipment, GC20FZ with Vibratory Box Feeder](https://powdercoating-en.com/manual-coating-equipment-gc20fz-1-2.html)
This vibratory powder coating system is fitted with a 150W vibration motor at the bottom and feeds powder directly from the original powder box. Color changes do not require hopper replacement or cleaning, which helps save significant time and labor.

 ![Powder Coating System for Manual Coating Equipment, GC21F with Hopper](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/pros_img03_m.webp)

[Powder Coating System for Manual Coating Equipment, GC21F with Hopper](https://powdercoating-en.com/manual-coating-equipment-gc21f-1-3.html)
Fitted with a 50L powder hopper and paired with a PPH40 powder pump, MG20 manual spray gun, and GC21 controller, this model offers excellent flexibility and is well suited for manual coating of large workpieces. It is simple to operate and convenient to use.

 ![Powder Coating System for Manual Powder Coating Kits, GC21FZ with Vibratory Box Feeder](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/pros_img04_m.webp)

[Powder Coating System for Manual Powder Coating Kits, GC21FZ with Vibratory Box Feeder](https://powdercoating-en.com/manual-coating-kits-gc21fz-1-4.html)
Equipped with a high-frequency vibration table trolley, PPH40 powder pump, MG20 manual spray gun, and GC21 controller, this model is designed for complex powder handling and supports easy, fast color change.

Company

Haztek has been a trusted company in manufacturing powder coating equipment since its establishment in 2012. Building on a founding team with over 20 years of expertise, we provide a comprehensive range of powder coating solutions from manual electrostatic spray guns to automatic powder coating lines. By integrating world-class components and adhering to strict CE and ATEX safety standards, we provide our global customers with a superior coating reliability.

title: Powder Coating System for Manual Coating Kits, GC20F with Hopper
content:
Watch Videos
 ![owder Coating System for Manual Coating Kits, GC20F with Hopper](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-kits-gc20f-1-1_img01_b.webp)

 Powder Coating System for Manual Coating Kits, GC20F with Hopper

- Powder hopper Capacity 50L

- Output Voltage 100kV

- Input Pressure 5.5-6bar

- Maximum Powder Output 520g/min

The GC20F mobile electrostatic powder coating system features a hopper-fed design, engineered for high-performance manual coating applications. It combines efficient powder feeding and fluidization for even powder suspension, high-voltage electrostatic attraction for stable powder transfer efficiency, portable manual operation for small batches and complex workpieces, and fast color change capability.

Its modular trolley structure integrates the spray gun, powder pump, and controller while also improving movement balance. With front swivel casters and a user-friendly rotating handle, operators can move the system easily through busy workshop environments and bring it directly to large workpieces such as vehicle frames, construction machinery chassis, or extra-long aluminum profiles, helping reduce preparation time before coating.

Applications

- Large Steel Structures and Construction Machinery
 For oversized and heavy workpieces such as excavator booms and tower crane sections, the GC20F trolley can move flexibly around the workpiece with the operator. Its 50L powder hopper supports long continuous coating runs and helps avoid color inconsistency caused by frequent powder refilling.

- Architectural Curtain Walls and Aluminum Profiles
 Suitable for base coating of aluminum alloy doors and windows, curtain wall panels, and other aluminum profile products, ensuring stable and consistent film thickness during continuous production.

 ![Powder Coating of Metal Fences](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-kits-gc20f-1-1_img07s.webp) Powder Coating of Metal Fences

 ![Powder Coating of Flat Workpieces](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-kits-gc20f-1-1_img08s.webp) Powder Coating of Flat Workpieces

 ![Powder Coating of Vent Covers](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-kits-gc20f-1-1_img09s.webp) Powder Coating of Vent Covers

 Technical Parameters

| Standard input voltage | 100–240 VAC | Maximum air consumption | 8.5 Nm³/h |
|---|---|---|---|
| Frequency | 50–60 Hz | CANBus communication protocol | Support |
| Standard output voltage (to spray gun) | 12 V | External control (workpiece recognition system) | Support |
| Standard output current (to spray gun) | 1.2 A | Metal powder | Support |
| Spray gun output voltage | 100 kV | Other polyester powder | Support |
| Spray gun output current | 100 uA | Powder hose length | 6 m |
| Polarity | Cathode | Powder hose specification | 12×18 / 11×17 mm |
| Protection level | IP54 | Powder hose material | POE with conductive strip |
| Temperature range | -40°C to 85°C | Maximum powder discharge rate | 520 g/min |
| Input pressure | 5.5–6 bar | - | - |

System Components

This powder coating system mainly includes the GC20A controller, MG20 manual spray gun, trolley, PPH40 powder pump (maximum powder output: 520 g/min), 50L powder hopper, Nozzles & Spare Parts, powder hose, air pressure valve, and related accessories.

 ![High-Performance Spray Gun Control Unit](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-kits-gc20f-1-1_img10m.webp)

 High-Performance Spray Gun Control Unit

The control unit is equipped with digital valve technology and PCC precise current control, helping maintain stable airflow and pressure during the coating process. It also provides precise current adjustment below 10 µA, which helps prevent powder overcharging and improves coating stability and quality.

- The GC20A controller supports up to 20 programmable coating programs, and each parameter set can be saved automatically for quick recall in future production.

- It is equipped with a CANOpen communication module and provides an EDS file, offering strong support for secondary development and equipment connectivity.

- The system features built-in self-diagnosis and one-touch cleaning. The self-diagnosis function monitors the operating status automatically and alerts users to potential issues in time.

- The one-touch cleaning function greatly simplifies spray gun cleaning and maintenance, helping improve color change efficiency.

Three preset coating modes are available for flat parts, recoat parts, and complex parts. With dedicated buttons, a touchscreen, and a stepless adjustment knob, the controller enables fast and efficient operation.

Hardware Configuration

- LED display: Clear and refined screen display

- Power supply: Taiwan Mean Well power supply with 0V and 24V dual-channel output

- Main control chip: STMicroelectronics 32-bit STM MCU

- Power management: Texas Instruments power management chip with DSP and analog technology

- Solenoid valve: Japan SMC solenoid valve

 ![MG20 Manual Spray Gun](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-kits-gc20f-1-1_img11m.webp)

 MG20 Manual Spray Gun

The MG20 manual spray gun is equipped with a built-in 100 kV high-voltage module and is suitable for most standard powder types.

Its built-in 100 kV high-efficiency voltage multiplication circuit ensures stable output for better coating performance. In addition to handling most common powders, it can also coat materials that are traditionally difficult to charge. Its wear-resistant design and carefully selected materials also help reduce maintenance costs.

The MG20 spray gun features an ergonomic design and weighs only 510 g, combining light weight with strong durability. Its unique spray angle and handle design help reduce operator fatigue during long working hours. The external remote control module allows coating parameters to be adjusted easily, and preset coating programs can be switched quickly by double-clicking the trigger, helping improve working efficiency.

 ![PPH40 Powder Pump](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-kits-gc20f-1-1_img12m.webp)

 PPH40 Powder Pump

Suitable for fast color change and quick cleaning, the PPH40 powder pump features a plug-and-play design for fast installation, fast color change, and quick cleaning. Its quick-connect powder hose structure makes hose removal and reconnection easier during cleaning. The venturi tube is made of high-quality non-stick material and is fitted with a quick connector for compressed air. It delivers stable and even powder feeding with excellent atomization, helping produce high-quality coatings. The maximum powder output can reach 520 g/min, depending on the actual configuration and powder type.

Packaging & Shipping

Need Custom Powder Coating System for Your Project?

We develop tailored coating system solutions based on your drawings, layout plans, or project requirements. Contact us today to bring your project to life.

Become a Distributor

Haztek has been specializing in the R&D, manufacturing, and complete line integration of electrostatic powder coating equipment since 2012. Backed by a core team with more than 20 years of industry experience and strong in-house development capability, Haztek is now inviting partners with channel resources in industrial equipment, coating engineering, or machinery automation to become our regional distributors and help expand our global market presence.

[Discover More](https://powdercoating-en.com/become-a-distributor.html)

---

title: Powder Coating System for Manual Coating Equipment, GC20FZ with Vibratory Box Feeder
content:
Watch Videos
 ![Powder Coating System for Manual Coating Equipment, GC20FZ with Vibratory Box Feeder](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-equipment-gc20fz-1-2_img01_b.webp)

 Powder Coating System for Manual Coating Equipment, GC20FZ with Vibratory Box Feeder

- Powder hopper Capacity 50L

- Output Voltage 100kV

- Input Pressure 5.5-6bar

- Maximum Powder Output 520g/min

To meet the growing demand for small-batch production, multiple product varieties, and fast delivery in modern manufacturing, The GC20FZ manual powder coating system provides a highly flexible coating solution. Its main advantage is the replacement of the traditional powder hopper with an inclined vibratory platform design. Operators can place the original powder box directly on the vibration table, allowing the suction tube to draw powder straight from the box. With the support of a 150W high-frequency vibration motor installed at the base, the powder is guided toward the pickup point through the combined effect of gravity and mechanical vibration, helping improve powder utilization.

This direct powder feeding design eliminates the need to clean the hopper after every color change. It is an ideal choice for flexible production lines, color sampling rooms, and small processing workshops.

Applications

- Color Sampling Centers and Powder Laboratories
 For R&D environments that test dozens of colors each day, operators only need to replace the powder box and activate the one-touch hose cleaning function to complete a color change in as little as 2 minutes.

- Customized Small Metal Parts
 Suitable for small-batch and multi-color coating of aluminum parts, motorcycle accessories, sheet metal parts, metal panels, radiators, and fan housings. This design helps minimize powder waste caused by hopper cleaning during frequent color changes.

- ![Powder Coating of Heat Sinks](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-equipment-gc20fz-1-2_img07s.webp) Powder Coating of Heat Sinks

- ![Powder Coating of Centrifugal Fan Housings](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-equipment-gc20fz-1-2_img08s.webp) Powder Coating of Centrifugal Fan Housings

- ![Powder Coating of Aluminum Alloy Wheels](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-equipment-gc20fz-1-2_img09s.webp) Powder Coating of Aluminum Alloy Wheels

 Technical Parameters

| Standard input voltage | 100–240 VAC | Maximum air consumption | 8.5 Nm³/h |
|---|---|---|---|
| Frequency | 50–60 Hz | CANBus communication protocol | Support |
| Standard output voltage (to spray gun) | 12 V | External control (workpiece recognition system) | Support |
| Standard output current (to spray gun) | 1.2 A | Metal powder | Support |
| Spray gun output voltage | 100 kV | Other polyester powder | Support |
| Spray gun output current | 100 μA | Powder hose length | 6m |
| Polarity | Cathode | Powder hose specification | 12 × 18 / 11 × 17 mm |
| Protection level | IP54 | Powder hose material | POE with conductive strip |
| Temperature range | -40°C to 85°C | Maximum powder discharge rate | 520 g/min |
| Input pressure | 5.5–6 bar | - | - |

System Components

This system mainly includes the GC20 main control unit, MG20 manual spray gun, PPH40 powder pump, powder hose (12 × 18 mm, 6 m), pressure regulating valve and air distribution unit, standard powder hose connection accessories, and Nozzles & Spare Parts.

 ![High-Performance Spray Gun Control Unit](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-equipment-gc20fz-1-2_img10m.webp)

 High-Performance Spray Gun Control Unit

The control unit is equipped with digital valve technology and PCC precise current control, helping maintain stable airflow and pressure during the coating process. It also provides precise current adjustment below 10 µA, which helps prevent powder overcharging and improves coating stability and quality.

- The GC20A controller supports up to 20 programmable coating programs, and each parameter set can be saved automatically for quick recall in future production.

- It is equipped with a CANOpen communication module and provides an EDS file, offering strong support for secondary development and equipment connectivity.

- The system features built-in self-diagnosis and one-touch cleaning. The self-diagnosis function monitors the operating status automatically and alerts users to potential issues in time.

- The one-touch cleaning function greatly simplifies spray gun cleaning and maintenance, helping improve color change efficiency.

Three preset coating modes are available for flat parts, recoat parts, and complex parts. With dedicated buttons, a touchscreen, and a stepless adjustment knob, the controller enables fast and efficient operation.

Hardware Configuration

- LED display: Clear and refined screen display

- Power supply: Taiwan Mean Well power supply with 0V and 24V dual-channel output

- Main control chip: STMicroelectronics 32-bit STM MCU

- Power management: Texas Instruments power management chip with DSP and analog technology

- Solenoid valve: Japan SMC solenoid valve

 ![MG20 Manual Spray Gun](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-equipment-gc20fz-1-2_img11m.webp)

 MG20 Manual Spray Gun

The MG20 manual spray gun is equipped with a built-in 100 kV high-voltage module and is suitable for most standard powder types.

Its built-in 100 kV high-efficiency voltage multiplication circuit ensures stable output for better coating performance. In addition to handling most common powders, it can also coat materials that are traditionally difficult to charge. Its wear-resistant design and carefully selected materials also help reduce maintenance costs.

The MG20 spray gun features an ergonomic design and weighs only 510 g, combining light weight with strong durability. Its unique spray angle and handle design help reduce operator fatigue during long working hours. The external remote control module allows coating parameters to be adjusted easily, and preset coating programs can be switched quickly by double-clicking the trigger, helping improve working efficiency.

 ![PPH40 Powder Pump](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-equipment-gc20fz-1-2_img12m.webp)

 PPH40 Powder Pump

Suitable for fast color change and quick cleaning, the PPH40 powder pump features a plug-and-play design for fast installation, fast color change, and quick cleaning. Its quick-connect powder hose structure makes hose removal and reconnection easier during cleaning. The venturi tube is made of high-quality non-stick material and is fitted with a quick connector for compressed air. It delivers stable and even powder feeding with excellent atomization, helping produce high-quality coatings. The maximum powder output can reach 520 g/min, depending on the actual configuration and powder type.

 ![Vibration Table](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-equipment-gc20fz-1-2_img13m.webp)

 Vibration Table

The vibration table uses high-frequency vibration to keep powder particles suspended and break up agglomeration caused by gravity or electrostatic attraction, resulting in better powder flowability. It also reduces friction between powder particles, helping maintain a stable and consistent powder supply to the spray gun over time. This system draws powder directly from the original powder box, so there is no need to replace or clean the hopper during color changes.

title: Powder Coating System for Manual Coating Equipment, GC21F with Hopper
content:
Watch Videos
 ![Powder Coating System for Manual Coating Equipment, GC21F with Hopper](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-equipment-gc21f-1-3_img01_b.webp)

 Powder Coating System for Manual Coating Equipment, GC21F with Hopper

- Powder Hopper Capacity 50L

- Output Voltage 100kV

- Input Pressure 5.5-6bar

- Maximum Powder Output 520g/min

Developed as a flagship model for high-end export markets and high-precision part coating, The GC21F manual powder coating system integrates an advanced control chip and intelligent sensing algorithms.

Equipped with a modular heavy-duty trolley and a 50l powder hopper, the manual powder coating spray system is especially suitable for applications that require highly consistent coating results, such as premium aluminum curtain wall profiles and export-oriented home appliance production lines.

Features

 Digital Core Control:
 The GC21 controller uses a high-performance 32-bit processor and supports up to 20 programmable coating programs. Each program can store voltage, current, powder output, and atomizing air pressure settings, allowing complex coating processes to be recalled with one touch and helping operators achieve consistent coating quality more easily.

 CANBus Connectivity:
 With an industrial-grade CANBus communication interface, the system can be linked with external workpiece recognition systems or reciprocators, providing strong support for intelligent production upgrades and digital factory integration.

 High Transfer Efficiency:
 The MG20 high-performance manual spray gun features optimized airflow design to improve first-pass powder transfer efficiency. Combined with multi-angle nozzles, it can reach complex corners, edges, and deep recessed areas more effectively.

Applications

 Variety, Small-Batch Coating:
 Suitable for customized architectural hardware, small-batch mechanical brackets, and trial coating of experimental samples.

 Touch-Up and Precision Coating for Complex Parts:
 Ideal for the inner areas of construction machinery cabins, complex grille structures, and electrical cabinets with deep cavities.

 Frequent Color Change Operations:
 Suitable for aluminum profile sampling, multi-color sports equipment, and decorative metal furniture.

- ![Powder Coating of Metal Radiator Housings](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-equipment-gc21f-1-3_img06s.webp) Powder Coating of Metal Radiator Housings

- ![Powder Coating of Centrifugal Fan Housings](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-equipment-gc21f-1-3_img07s.webp) Powder Coating of Centrifugal Fan Housings

- ![Powder Coating of Aluminum Alloy Wheels](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-equipment-gc21f-1-3_img08s.webp) Powder Coating of Aluminum Alloy Wheels

 Parameter

| Standard input voltage | 110–250 VAC | Maximum air consumption | 8.5 Nm³/h |
|---|---|---|---|
| Frequency | 50–60 Hz | CANBus communication protocol | Support |
| Standard output voltage (to spray gun) | 12 V | External control (workpiece recognition system) | Support |
| Standard output current (to spray gun) | 1.2 A | Metal powder | Support |
| Spray gun output voltage | 100 kV | Other polyester powder | Support |
| Spray gun output current | 100 uA | Powder hose length | 6 m |
| Polarity | Negative electrode | Powder hose specification | 11 × 17 mm |
| Protection level | IP54 | Powder hose material | POE with conductive strip |
| Temperature range | -40°C to 85°C | Maximum powder discharge rate | 520 g/min |
| Input pressure | 5.5–6 bar | - | - |

System Components

This system mainly includes the GC21 main control unit, MG20 manual spray gun, mobile trolley, 50L powder hopper, PPH40 powder pump, 6 m powder hose, pressure regulating valve and air distribution unit, standard hose connection accessories, and Nozzles & Spare Parts.

 ![High-Performance Spray Gun Control Unit](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-equipment-gc21f-1-3_img09m.webp)

 High-Performance Spray Gun Control Unit

- Equipped with digital valve technology and PCC precise current control, the unit ensures stable airflow and pressure during coating. It also provides precise current adjustment below 10 µA, helping prevent powder overcharging and improve coating stability and quality.

- The GC21 controller supports up to 20 programmable coating programs, and each parameter set can be saved automatically for fast recall in future production, helping improve working efficiency.

- The system includes a built-in self-diagnosis function that automatically monitors operating status, identifies issues in time, and helps keep the equipment running reliably.

 ![MG20 Manual Spray Gun](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-equipment-gc21f-1-3_img10m.webp)

 MG20 Manual Spray Gun

The MG20 manual spray gun features a built-in 100 kV high-efficiency voltage multiplication circuit that ensures stable output for outstanding coating performance. It is suitable for most standard powder types and can also handle powders that are traditionally difficult to charge. Its wear-resistant design and selected materials also help reduce maintenance costs.

The MG20 spray gun offers an ergonomic design and weighs only 510 g, combining light weight with excellent durability. Its unique spray angle and handle design help reduce operator fatigue during long working hours. The external remote control module allows parameters to be adjusted easily, and preset coating programs can be switched quickly by double-clicking the trigger, helping improve production efficiency.

 ![PPH40 Powder Pump](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-equipment-gc21f-1-3_img11m.webp)

 PPH40 Powder Pump

The PPH40 powder pump features a plug-and-play design and is suitable for fast color change and quick cleaning. Its quick-connect powder hose structure makes disassembly and reconnection easier during cleaning. The venturi tube is made of high-quality non-stick material and is equipped with a quick connector for compressed air. It delivers stable and even powder feeding with excellent atomization, helping produce high-quality coatings. The maximum powder output can reach 520 g/min, depending on the actual configuration and powder type.

Packaging & Shipping

title: Powder Coating System for Manual Powder Coating Kits, GC21FZ with Vibratory Box Feeder
content:
Watch Videos
 ![Powder Coating System for Manual Powder Coating Kits, GC21FZ with Vibratory Box Feeder](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/manual-coating-kits-gc21fz-1-4_img01_b.webp)

 Powder Coating System for Manual Powder Coating Kits, GC21FZ with Vibratory Box Feeder

- Powder Hopper Capacity 50L

- Output Voltage 100kV

- Input Pressure 5.5-6bar

- Maximum Powder Output 520g/min

The GC21FZ manual powder coating system is equipped with an inclined vibration table and a PPH40 powder pump, eliminating the need for a conventional powder hopper. The system draws powder directly from the original powder box, making fast color change much easier. The powder pump supports localized powder fluidization and quick cleaning, helping improve operating efficiency. The inclined vibratory platform ensures efficient powder utilization and stable powder output, making this model an ideal choice for small-batch production, sampling, and batch testing.

Applications

- Flexible Customized Production Lines (Touch-Up Stations)
 At the end of high-end automatic powder coating lines, the GC21FZ is used for manual touch-up of highly complex workpieces such as artistic curtain wall panels and precision instrument housings. Through CANBus connectivity, its coating data can also be synchronized with the factory monitoring system.

- New Material Development and Testing
 For high-performance coating materials such as conductive powders and metal powders, its precise PCC technology enables accurate electrostatic control and helps prevent spark breakdown, making it a preferred solution for material testing.

title: Automatic Powder Coating System for Powder Coating Equipment
content:
Automatic Powder Coating System for Powder Coating Equipment

 The automatic powder coating system is an industrial coating solution that uses high-voltage electrostatics to charge powder particles, allowing them to adhere evenly to grounded workpiece surfaces under an electrostatic field. The system typically consists of automatic spray guns, a high-voltage generator, a powder feeding system, and a control unit. It offers high efficiency, uniform coating quality, fast color change, and reliable integration with automated production lines.

Watch Videos

![Automatic Powder Coating System](https://powdercoating-en.com/images/video9b.webp)

Applications

 Home Appliance Manufacturing

Large-scale coating of refrigerator panels, washing machine housings, air conditioner casings, and similar products, including production lines for brands such as Midea and Haier

 Building Materials Industry

Automated coating lines for aluminum profiles, door and window profiles, and curtain wall systems

 Metal Processing Industry

Large-scale production of standardized workpieces such as cabinets and sheet metal parts

---

title: Automatic Powder Coating System for Powder Coating Kits, GC21A
content:
Watch Videos
 ![Automatic Powder Coating System for Powder Coating Kits, GC21A](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-kits-gc21a-2-1_img01_b.webp)

 ![Automatic Powder Coating System for Powder Coating Kits, GC21A](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-kits-gc21a-2-1_img02_m.webp)
 ![Automatic Powder Coating System for Powder Coating Kits, GC21A](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-kits-gc21a-2-1_img03_m.webp)

 Automatic Powder Coating System for Powder Coating Kits, GC21A

- Output Voltage 100kV

- Input Pressure 5.5-6bar

- Maximum Powder Output 420g/min

Developed for large-scale production on modern automated coating lines, GC21A automatic powder coating system delivers advanced digital control over coating process parameters. Its core control unit supports up to 20 programmable coating programs, allowing operators to preset the optimal coating strategy for different workpieces.

Our automatic powder coating system customization service covers the full process from requirement analysis and solution design to equipment maintenance. Based on the characteristics and production needs of different industries such as home appliances, building materials, aluminum processing, heavy industry, construction machinery, MDF furniture, and new energy vehicles, Haztek provides complete and efficient powder coating system solutions tailored to your project. From plant layout and equipment selection to process design and automation integration, the powder coating system supports a one-stop turnkey coating solution.

Applications

- Vertical Coating Systems for Architectural Aluminum Profiles
 For aluminum profiles measuring several meters in length, the GC21A can work together with reciprocators to deliver a highly consistent spray pattern. Its 250 stored programs can retain specific air pressure parameters for hundreds of profile types, allowing quick line changeover with one-touch program switching.

- Horizontal Coating Systems for Medium-Sized Hardware Parts
 Suitable for products such as automotive parts, fitness equipment, hardware furniture, door and window accessories, and shelving components. The system helps maintain stable powder transfer efficiency and consistent coating thickness even on high-speed production lines.

- ![Powder Coating of Grooved Pipes](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-kits-gc21a-2-1_img04s.webp) Powder Coating of Grooved Pipes

- ![Powder Coating of Electrical Cabinets](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-kits-gc21a-2-1_img05s.webp) Powder Coating of Electrical Cabinets

- ![Powder Coating of Automotive Parts](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-kits-gc21a-2-1_img06s.webp) Powder Coating of Automotive Parts

- ![Powder Coating of Springs](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-kits-gc21a-2-1_img07s.webp) Powder Coating of Springs

- ![Powder Coating of Aluminum Profiles](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-kits-gc21a-2-1_img08s.webp) Powder Coating of Aluminum Profiles

- ![Powder Coating of Lighting Accessories](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-kits-gc21a-2-1_img09s.webp) Powder Coating of Lighting Accessories

 Technical Parameters

| Standard input voltage | 100–250 VAC | Maximum air consumption | 8.5 Nm³/h |
|---|---|---|---|
| Frequency | 50–60 Hz | Communication protocol | CAN Bus |
| Standard output voltage (to spray gun) | 12 V | External control (workpiece recognition system) | Support |
| Maximum output current (to spray gun) | 1.2 A | Metal powder | Yes |
| Spray gun output voltage (electrostatic) | 100 kV | Other polyester powder | Yes |
| Spray gun output current (electrostatic) | 100 μA | Powder hose length | 16m/20m, or configured according to specific project requirements |
| Polarity | Negative electrode | Powder hose specification | 11 × 17 mm |
| Protection grade | IP54 | Powder hose material | POE with conductive strip |
| Temperature range | -40°C to 85°C | Maximum powder discharge rate | 420 g/min |
| Input pressure | 5.5–6 bar | - | - |

System Components

This system mainly includes the AG20 automatic spray gun, GC21 main control unit, PPH40 powder pump, dust-proof electrical cabinet, management system, and Nozzles & Spare Parts.

 ![GC21 Main Control Unit](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-kits-gc21a-2-1_img10m.webp)
 ![GC21 Main Control Unit](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-kits-gc21a-2-1_img11m.webp)

 GC21 Main Control Unit

- Button 1: Multi-dimensional stepless adjustment knob for instant control of current, voltage, and other operating parameters

- Button 2: Three daily quick programs for new parts, complex recessed parts, and back spray parts

Features

- Programmable Coating Programs:
 The controller includes more than 20 programmable coating programs and 3 daily quick programs, allowing operators to switch quickly between different workpiece types, improve production efficiency, and reduce material consumption.

- One-Touch Expert Parameter Activation:
 Operators can select the required mode directly on the control panel to activate optimized coating parameters with one touch. This simplifies operation, reduces manual adjustment, and helps maintain stable and efficient coating quality.

- Precise Powder Output Control:
 The system is equipped with DVC digital valve technology for precise powder output control, helping ensure consistent coating performance across different production conditions.

- Flexible Control Modes:
 The controller supports both CANBus fieldbus network control and standalone operation. It also allows external I/O signal input for integration with external control systems.

- Advanced Program and Hardware Configuration:
 Built-in 250 programmable spray programs and 3 daily quick programs for flat parts, back spray parts, and irregular parts. The controller also features a multi-dimensional incremental knob for precise adjustment of air pressure, voltage, and current, combined with premium-brand hardware for reliable performance.

Controller Parameters

| Standard input voltage | 100–240 V AC |
|---|---|
| Frequency | 50–60 Hz |
| Standard output voltage (to spray gun) | 12 V |
| Maximum output current (to spray gun) | 1.2 A |
| Protection grade | IP54 |
| Temperature range | -40°C to 85°C |
| Output pressure | 5.5–6.5 bar |
| Maximum air consumption | 8.5 Nm³/h |

 ![AG20 Automatic Spray Gun](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-kits-gc21a-2-1_img12m.webp)

 AG20 Automatic Spray Gun

The AG20 automatic spray gun features a built-in 100 kV high-performance voltage multiplication module and offers a variety of nozzles, including fan nozzles, 90° nozzles, and 135° nozzles, allowing it to adapt to workpieces with different shapes and complex geometries.

It is suitable for most commonly used powder types and incorporates a unique three-stage air intake technology that continuously cleans the electrode needle and helps prevent powder buildup.

Two installation options are available

 ![Integrated extension rod mounting](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-kits-gc21a-2-1_img13.webp)

Integrated extension rod mounting
 The cable is enclosed inside the tube structure, providing better sealing performance. This design helps reduce dust accumulation and effectively minimizes interference from powder contamination and aging.

 ![Base mounting](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-kits-gc21a-2-1_img14.webp)

Base mounting
 Easy to install, simple to maintain, and cost-effective.

 ![PPH40 Powder Pump](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-kits-gc21a-2-1_img15m.webp)

 PPH40 Powder Pump

The PPH40 powder pump features a plug-and-play design for quick installation. It supports a maximum powder output of 520 g/min and enables fast color change.

Packaging & Shipping

---

title: Automatic Powder Coating System for Powder Coating Equipment, GC20A
content:
Watch Videos
 ![Automatic Powder Coating System for Powder Coating Equipment, GC20A](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-equipment-gc20a-2-2_img01_b.webp)

 ![Automatic Powder Coating System for Powder Coating Equipment, GC20A](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-equipment-gc20a-2-2_img02_m.webp)
 ![Automatic Powder Coating System for Powder Coating Equipment, GC20A](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-equipment-gc20a-2-2_img03_m.webp)

 Automatic Powder Coating System for Powder Coating Equipment, GC20A

- Output Voltage 100kV

- Input Pressure 5.5-6bar

- Maximum Powder Output 420g/min

The GC20A automatic powder coating system integrates the CoatPilot® coating management system, transforming the traditional single-gun control approach into intelligent coordination for large-scale spray gun groups. It combines high production safety, open communication interfaces, and efficient material savings, making it a core coating unit for building modern smart factories.

Our customization service for automatic powder coating system covers the full process from requirement analysis and solution design to equipment maintenance. Based on the characteristics and production needs of different industries such as home appliances, building materials, aluminum processing, defense and heavy industry, construction machinery, MDF furniture, and new energy vehicles, Haztek provides complete, efficient, and intelligent powder coating equipment solutions tailored to your project. From plant layout and equipment selection to process design and automation integration, the powder coating equipment supports a one-stop turnkey coating solution.

Applications

- ![Powder Coating of Automotive Parts](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-equipment-gc20a-2-2_img04_m.webp) Powder Coating of Automotive Parts

- ![Powder Coating of Electrical Cabinets and Enclosures](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-equipment-gc20a-2-2_img05_m.webp) Powder Coating of Electrical Cabinets and Enclosures

- ![Powder Coating Line for Doors and Windows](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-equipment-gc20a-2-2_img06_m.webp) Powder Coating Line for Doors and Windows

- ![Powder Coating of Extra-Heavy Workpieces](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-equipment-gc20a-2-2_img07_m.webp) Powder Coating of Extra-Heavy Workpieces

- ![Powder Coating of Home Appliance Housings](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-equipment-gc20a-2-2_img08_m.webp) Powder Coating of Home Appliance Housings

- ![Powder Coating of Hardware Furniture](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-equipment-gc20a-2-2_img09_m.webp) Powder Coating of Hardware Furniture

- ![Powder Coating of Fan Guard Covers](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-equipment-gc20a-2-2_img10_m.webp) Powder Coating of Fan Guard Covers

- ![Powder Coating of Long Aluminum Profiles](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-equipment-gc20a-2-2_img11_m.webp) Powder Coating of Long Aluminum Profiles

 Technical Parameters

| Standard input voltage | 100–240 VAC | Maximum air consumption | 8.5 Nm³/h |
|---|---|---|---|
| Frequency | 50–60 Hz | Communication protocol | CANopen |
| Standard output voltage (to spray gun) | 12 V | External control (workpiece recognition system) | Support |
| Maximum output current (to spray gun) | 1.2 A | Metal powder | Yes |
| Maximum spray gun output voltage | 100 kV | Other polyester powder | Yes |
| Maximum spray gun output current | 100 μA | Powder hose length | 16m/20m, or configured according to specific project requirements |
| Polarity | Negative electrode | Powder hose diameter | 11 × 17 mm / 12 × 18 mm (optional) |
| Protection level | IP54 | Powder hose material | POE with conductive strip |
| Temperature range | -40°C to 85°C | Maximum powder discharge rate | 420 g/min |
| Output pressure | 5.5–6.5 bar | - | - |

System Components

This system mainly includes the GC20A controller, AG20 automatic electrostatic powder spray gun, dust-proof electrical cabinet (IP54), PPH40 powder pump, management system, and Nozzles & Spare Parts.

 ![GC20A Automatic Spray Gun Controller](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-equipment-gc20a-2-2_img12m.webp)
 ![GC20A Automatic Spray Gun Controller](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-equipment-gc20a-2-2_img13m.webp)

 GC20A Automatic Spray Gun Controller

- Button 1: Three daily quick programs for new parts, complex recessed parts, and back spray parts

- Button 2: Touchscreen display for fast selection of the current control item, used together with a stepless adjustment knob

- Button 3: supports real-time parameter adjustment

Features

- Stable Airflow and Pressure Control:
 The GC20A automatic spray gun controller is equipped with DVC digital valve technology and PCC precise current control, helping maintain stable airflow and pressure during the coating process. It also provides precise current adjustment below 10 µA, preventing powder overcharging and improving coating stability and quality.

- Programmable Coating Programs:
 The GC20A controller supports up to 20 programmable coating programs, and each parameter group can be saved automatically for future use.

- Open Communication and Connectivity:
 It is equipped with a CANOpen communication module and provides an EDS file, offering strong support for secondary development and equipment connectivity.

- Self-Diagnosis and One-Touch Cleaning:
 The system features built-in self-diagnosis and one-touch cleaning. It can automatically detect operating status, identify issues in time, and simplify spray gun cleaning and maintenance to improve color change efficiency.

Controller Parameters

| Item | Specification |
|---|---|
| Standard input voltage | 100–240 VAC |
| Frequency | 50–60 Hz |
| Standard output voltage (to spray gun) | 12 V |
| Maximum output current (to spray gun) | 1.2 A |
| Protection level | IP54 |
| Temperature range | -40°C to 85°C |
| Output pressure | 5.5–6.5 bar |
| Maximum air consumption | 8.5 Nm³/h |

 ![Dust-Proof Electrical Cabinet](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-equipment-gc20a-2-2_img14m.webp)

 Dust-Proof Electrical Cabinet

The dust-proof electrical cabinet uses a multi-sealing design, including silicone rubber sealing rings and sealed connectors, to achieve IP54 protection. It helps prevent the ingress of dust, moisture, and corrosive substances, making it suitable for demanding industrial environments.

 ![CoatPilot Coating Management System](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-equipment-gc20a-2-2_img15m.webp)

 CoatPilot Coating Management System

The GC20NA-C controller and GC20A controller can be expanded with the CoatPilot coating management system to achieve centralized management of large spray gun groups.

Features

- Simplified handling of complex processes Global modular management allows process parameters to be deployed quickly across a wide range of workpiece types, improving changeover efficiency and making repeatable quality easier to achieve.

- Simple, safe, and fast operation A 12-inch multi-touch display is used to control the entire coating process. With intuitive options, clear visual icons, and visible parameter settings, machine status can be checked at a glance.

- Open integration with third-party systems The CoatPilot system is designed with strong openness and compatibility. It can be integrated into your production environment through ERP, MES, and other third-party system APIs, helping create a more powerful and connected automated manufacturing system.

 ![AG20 Automatic Spray Gun](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-equipment-gc20a-2-2_img16m.webp)

 AG20 Automatic Spray Gun

The AG20 automatic spray gun features a built-in 100 kV high-performance voltage multiplication module, ensuring stable output and high powder transfer efficiency. The electrode needle adopts a three-stage air intake design that helps keep the needle tip clean, effectively prevents powder buildup, and maintains strong electrostatic release performance.

It is suitable for most commonly used powders, including metal powders and various polyester powders. With precise voltage and current control together with a modular structure design, the AG20 delivers reliable and uniform coating quality on flat parts, recessed areas, and irregular workpieces.

Two installation options are available

 ![Integrated extension rod mounting](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-equipment-gc20a-2-2_img17.webp)

Integrated extension rod mounting
 The cable is enclosed inside the tube structure, providing better sealing performance. This design helps reduce dust accumulation and effectively minimizes dust interference and aging.

 ![Base mounting](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-equipment-gc20a-2-2_img18.webp)

Base mounting
 Easy to install, simple to maintain, and cost-effective.

 ![PPH40 Powder Pump](https://powdercoating-en.com/products/automatic-coating-equipment-gc20a-2-2_img19m.webp)

 PPH40 Powder Pump

Suitable for fast color change and quick cleaning, the PPH40 powder pump features a plug-and-play design for fast installation, fast color change, and quick cleaning. Its quick-connect powder hose structure makes hose disassembly and reconnection easier during cleaning. The venturi tube is made of high-quality non-stick material and is equipped with a quick connector for compressed air. It provides stable and even powder feeding with excellent atomization, helping produce high-quality coatings. The maximum powder output can reach 520 g/min, depending on the actual configuration and powder type.

Packaging & Shipping

title: About Us
content:
Watch Videos
 ![About Us](https://powdercoating-en.com/about/about-us_img01b.webp)

 About Us

Founded in 2012, Guangdong Haztek Coating Technology Co., Ltd. (Haztek) specializes in the research, development, and manufacturing of electrostatic powder coating equipment. Backed by a core team with more than 20 years of industry experience, Haztek offers a complete product and solution range covering manual coating units, automatic powder coating systems, and integrated coating line solutions.

With strict standards for core component selection and strong industry expertise, Haztek has obtained ISO9001:2015 quality management system certification, as well as CE and ATEX certifications for the European market. The company serves leading enterprises such as Midea, Haier, CITIC Dicastal, HIKVISION, SANY Heavy Industry, and Xingfa Aluminum, while continuing to expand its presence in global markets.

Our Strengths

 Technology Innovation and R&D
 Haztek has established long-term cooperation with Gema Switzerland GmbH, Guangdong University of Technology, and other research institutions, and has set up an R&D center in Shenzhen. The company has obtained more than 10 high-tech product certifications, multiple software copyrights, and more than 10 R&D patents.

 Strict Quality Standards
 Haztek insists on using internationally recognized brands for key electronic components, helping ensure low failure rates even under heavy-duty and continuous operating conditions.

- Spray gun parts and electronic components are sourced from leading global brands such as NXP, Texas Instruments, STMicroelectronics, and Japan Haruna capacitors.

- The company has passed internationally recognized ISO9001:2015, CE, and ATEX certifications, further strengthening its position as a trusted industry supplier.

 Customized System Integration Capability
 Haztek’s customized service covers the full process from requirement analysis and solution design to equipment maintenance. Based on the needs of industries such as home appliances, building materials, aluminum processing, heavy industry, construction machinery, MDF furniture, and new energy vehicles, Haztek provides complete, lean, and intelligent coating line systems tailored to each project, with full turnkey solution support.

 Fast Delivery and Global Service
 With standardized production processes in place, Haztek ensures that standard equipment can be shipped within 3 to 5 working days. Supported by its overseas after-sales service network in Vietnam and Southeast Asia, the company provides localized installation, commissioning, and technical response support for customers in Europe, Australia, Russia, the Middle East, and other international markets.

- ![ATEX Certification](https://powdercoating-en.com/about/about-us_img05_m.webp) ATEX Certification

- ![ISO 9001](https://powdercoating-en.com/about/about-us_img06_m.webp) ISO 9001

- ![CE(Electrostatic Spray Guns and Control Unit)](https://powdercoating-en.com/about/about-us_img07_m.webp) CE(Electrostatic Spray Guns and Control Unit)

- ![CE(Electrostatic Spray Guns and Control Unit)](https://powdercoating-en.com/about/about-us_img08_m.webp) CE(Electrostatic Spray Guns and Control Unit)

 Global Reach

Haztek’s brand has expanded into multiple countries and regions worldwide.

![Global Reach](https://powdercoating-en.com/about/about-us_img09_b.webp)

 Brand Expansion Across Multiple Countries Worldwide

- Foshan Headquarters

- 1 Southwest China Region

- 2 Central China Region

- 3 East China Region

- 4 North China Region

- 5 Northeast China Region

- 6 Vietnam Region

- A Russia

- B Turkey

- C Thailand

- D Vietnam

- E Malaysia

Project Experience

Haztek has established project cooperation with more than 4,500 well-known companies worldwide.

title: Become a Distributor
content:
Become a Distributor

Haztek has been specializing in the R&D, manufacturing, and complete line integration of electrostatic powder coating equipment since 2012. Backed by a core team with more than 20 years of industry experience and strong in-house development capability, Haztek is now inviting partners with channel resources in industrial equipment, coating engineering, or machinery automation to become our regional distributors and help expand our global market presence.

Support Haztek Provides to Distributors

 Exclusive Distribution Rights
 Haztek grants exclusive rights to sell our powder coating spray guns within the distributor’s assigned country or region. This exclusive authorization helps you build a strong market position without competition from other distributors of the same brand in your territory.

 Competitive Pricing
 To support long-term cooperation, Haztek offers competitive pricing for equipment. Special discounts are also available for bulk orders, helping you increase your profit margins while delivering value to your customers.

 Marketing Support
 Haztek provides comprehensive marketing materials for powder coating equipment, including product catalogs, operating instructions, and promotional materials. We can also work with distributors on joint marketing activities in their local markets to increase brand visibility and support sales growth.

 Training and Technical Support
 Our technical team provides product consultation, training, and technical support to ensure you have the resources and assistance needed to develop your business effectively.

Sales Targets and Incentive Policies
 Haztek will work with distributors to set mutually agreed sales targets. After achieving the agreed targets, distributors may qualify for additional incentive policies.

Requirements for Exclusive Distributors

 Industry Experience
 Experience in the sales of powder coating equipment, surface treatment equipment, or related industrial machinery is required.

 Local Sales Capability
 The distributor should be able to promote and sell products in the local market and provide basic technical support.

 Customer Network
 Existing customer resources in industries such as metal processing, aluminum profiles, automotive parts, and hardware are preferred.

 After-Sales Service Capability
 Basic technical support capability is required. Haztek provides training and online guidance.

 Annual Purchase Target
 The distributor should be willing to meet the annual purchase volume or sales targets agreed by both parties.

 Brand Commitment
 The distributor must actively promote the Haztek brand and must not sell counterfeit or imitation products.

 Professional Marketing Capability
 Priority will be given to partners who can carry out marketing activities through trade shows, online promotion, local advertising, or showroom display.

 Business Plan Submission
 Applicants should provide information on the local distribution situation and price levels of Gema and Wagner. Based on this information, Haztek will evaluate whether sales targets need to be adjusted. A dedicated marketing promotion plan for the exclusive distributorship should also be submitted to Haztek.

---

title: Fully Automatic Powder Coating System for a Large Aluminum Profile Production Base in Asia
content:
![Fully Automatic Powder Coating System for a Large Aluminum Profile Production Base in Asia](https://powdercoating-en.com/about/case-aluminum-profile_img01b.webp)

 Fully Automatic Powder Coating System for a Large Aluminum Profile Production Base in Asia

As a major aluminum profile manufacturer in Asia, AAG operates with very high daily output and places strict demands on coating line continuity and coating consistency. This project covered multiple production lines and involved more than 400 spray guns in total.

System Configuration

- Milepost (c) controller

- AG20 automatic spray gun with integrated extension rod

- PPH40 high-efficiency powder pump

Project Results

 High Production Capacity:
 The system supports daily output of up to 110 tons under a two-shift production schedule.

 Significant Savings at Scale:
 The project helped the customer save up to RMB 2,050,000 (about USD 285,000) during the equipment procurement stage.

 Long-Term Cost Reduction:
 While maintaining high-quality coating performance, annual spray gun operating and maintenance costs were reduced from RMB 12,000 (about USD 1,750) per unit to RMB 5,000 (about USD 730) per unit, helping secure a strong return on investment for large-scale production lines.

- Watch Videos
 ![Fully Automatic Powder Coating System for a Large Aluminum Profile Production Base in Asia](https://powdercoating-en.com/about/case-aluminum-profile_img02_m.webp)

title: Automatic Powder Coating Case for a Large Automotive Parts Manufacturer
content:
![Automatic Powder Coating Case for a Large Automotive Parts Manufacturer](https://powdercoating-en.com/about/case-automotive-parts_img01b.webp)

 Automatic Powder Coating Case for a Large Automotive Parts Manufacturer

The automotive industry places extremely strict requirements on coating CPK values (process capability index). Chassis and transmission system parts require very strong electrostatic penetration to ensure reliable coating performance.

System Configuration

- Milepost controller

- AG09 automatic spray gun with extension rod

- PPH40 high-efficiency powder pump

Project Results

 Meeting Oem Quality Standards:
 The manual touch-up rate was reduced by 60%, solving coating challenges for deep holes and recessed parts while significantly improving the corrosion resistance of the components.

 Excellent Cost Control:
 Direct procurement costs were reduced by RMB 300,000 (about USD 43,900), while powder consumption was reduced by 10%, helping the customer stay competitive in the automotive parts market.

 Stable Long-Term Operation:
 Annual operating costs were reduced from RMB 10,000 per unit per year (about USD 1,463) to RMB 2,000 per unit per year (about USD 293), helping support long-term profitability.

content:

 Automatic Powder Coating Line for Fitness Equipment

Fitness equipment is typically made with a large number of steel tubes and welded components, which often create electrostatic shielding dead zones. The customer needed to solve the difficulty of powder coverage at welded joints while also increasing daily output.

System Configuration

- AG09 automatic spray gun (16 sets)

- PPH40 high-efficiency powder pump

Project Results

 Full Coating Coverage
 With Haztek’s high-voltage electrostatic control, the manual touch-up rate was reduced by 60%, helping ensure reliable anti-corrosion protection at complex welded areas.

 Higher Production Efficiency
 Production efficiency increased by 25%, while powder consumption was reduced by 10%.

 Lower Investment and Maintenance Costs
 The project reduced procurement costs by RMB 300,000 (about USD 43,900), and annual maintenance costs per spray gun were reduced by 80%.

title: Automated Coating Solution for OPPLE Group
content:
Automated Coating Solution for OPPLE Group

This overseas customer faced the dual challenge of a shortage of skilled technical personnel and rising raw material costs, creating an urgent need for a coating system that was easy to operate and capable of significantly reducing coating waste.

System Configuration

- Milepost controller

- AG09 automatic spray gun

- CoatPilot® coating management system

Project Results

 Faster Overseas Production Launch
 The project helped the customer save approximately RMB 350,000 (about USD 50,000) in investment and shortened the production line setup cycle.

 Reliable Lifecycle Support
 Although the project was located overseas, Haztek’s stable hardware, including the PPH40 powder pump, helped keep operating and maintenance costs at a very low level of RMB 2,000 per unit per year.

 Greener Production Performance
 Coating material waste was reduced by 10%, while production efficiency increased by 25%, supporting the environmental upgrade trend in Southeast Asian factories.
